body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/supplier/batch-add

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/supplier/batch-add

接口描述

批量新增供应商，单次最多新增50个供应商，不支持部分成功

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22Fx00000%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%9D%A5%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA-%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0D%0A%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%0D%0A%E8%8B%A5availableOrgIdList%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%9C%ACCode%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgIdList","label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8Id%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22CORx80000%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%9D%A5%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA-%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0D%0A%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8id%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%0D%0A%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8id%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgType","required":true,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201-%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%200-%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"corOrgNbr","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%9F%E4%B8%80%E4%BF%A1%E7%94%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"125444444444450005","desc":"","maxLength":"18"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%80%BC"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldCode","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SELECT_140332273","desc":"%20%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%3D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldValue","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%8D%95%E5%80%BC%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%80%BC","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E6%98%AF%E5%8D%95%E5%80%BC%E6%83%85%E5%86%B5%E4%B8%8B%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%98%AF%E5%A4%9A%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"multiValues","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%80%BC","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E6%98%AF%E5%A4%9A%E5%80%BC%E6%83%85%E5%86%B5%E4%B8%8B%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%98%AF%E5%8D%95%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%A5"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8E%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"name","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"enableDate","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-10-21","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%EF%BC%9Ayyyy-MM-dd%0A%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%BD%93%E5%A4%A9"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"recAccList","label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"accountMode","label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"BANK","desc":"%20%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%3A%20BANK-%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%20DIGITAL_YUAN-%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%B8%81%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"acctNo","maxLength":"30","label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"6217847384349543545","desc":"%20%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%20%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7%E9%9C%80%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8730%E4%BD%8D%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D%E6%88%96%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"acctType","maxLength":"1","label":"%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201-%E5%AF%B9%E5%85%AC%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%200-%E4%B8%AA%E4%BA%BA%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"collectingCompanyName","label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E4%B8%AD%E5%BF%83","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%B8%81%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%EF%BC%8C%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoBank","label":"%E8%81%94%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"105399100293","desc":"%20%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C%E8%81%94%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E5%85%AC%E5%85%B1%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96%EF%BC%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoName","label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D","required":true,"exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","desc":"%20%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%0A%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%E6%95%B0%E5%B8%81%E6%97%B6%E6%AD%A4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BB%A3%E8%A1%A8%E9%92%B1%E5%8C%85%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"mainAcct","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E4%B8%BB%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"1","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201-%E6%98%AF%200-%E5%90%A6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"state","maxLength":"1","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201-%E6%98%AF%200-%E5%90%A6","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"wthrDigitalYuanMainAcct","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%B8%81%E4%B8%BB%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%B8%81%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%EF%BC%8C%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%0A1-%E6%98%AF%EF%BC%8C0-%E5%90%A6"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supId","maxLength":"100","label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUP20241028164158777","desc":"%20%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E9%A1%BB%E6%98%AF100%E4%BD%8D%E4%BB%A5%E5%86%85%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D%E6%88%96%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E5%88%99%E7%94%B1%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supNam","required":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"czc%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%9511%20%20%20%20","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supSts","required":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%0A1-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86-%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","maxLength":"50"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

错误码 错误信息
EROOR1 接口调用失败
EROOR2 接口执行失败，例如必填字段未填、编码重复、供应商类型不存在、自定义字段编码不存在等情况
SUC0000 执行成功
